summary: Frontend-focused validation executed for owner dashboard no-show tab visibility bug. Owner login with PIN 9999 succeeds. Dashboard shows three prominent tab cards including 'NO SHOW TRACKER'. Automation was blocked before final click-to-panel assertion due repeated script-level issues (selector mismatch first, then unsupported Playwright method in wrapper).

integration_issues.flow: Owner no-show tab click to panel/API verification
integration_issues.issue: Could not complete final automated assertion after 3 failed attempts in this run due test-script/tooling issues (not confirmed as app defect).

action_items: Re-run a single clean Playwright check for no-show tab click -> owner-noshow-panel visible using only supported wrapper APIs.
Keep existing prominent tab-card UX; no visual clipping/hidden issue observed for no-show tab at desktop viewport.
Optional test hygiene: align/standardize owner login testid naming in test scripts to avoid selector drift.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issue found in OwnerDashboard tab rendering: tabs are explicit, labeled, and data-testid tagged.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API base (compliant with env usage requirement).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: owner login works with 9999, dashboard loads, and all three tabs (Daily book, No show tracker, Insights) are visible as prominent cards. Need one final deterministic automation/pass confirming click on no-show tab renders owner-noshow-panel and no-show metrics in this environment.
rca of the issue: This run's blocker was test execution quality, not a confirmed product defect: (1) initial selector mismatch (owner-pin-input vs input-owner-pin), (2) case-sensitive label assertion mismatch, (3) unsupported page.wait_for_response API in current browser automation wrapper. Due loop-prevention rule after three failed attempts, no further Playwright rewrite was done in this iteration.
